pages.title: Federal Remote Work Guidance 2027
pages.content: Federal Remote Work Guidance 2027: The U.S. Department of Labor recommends that employers provide up to $1,500 per year for remote work hardware expenses to promote a productive home office environment.

results.title: Federal Remote Work Guidance 2027
results.snippet: The U.S. Department of Labor recommends that employers provide up to $1,500 per year for remote work hardware expenses.
